title: Harpy Simple Roles
description: A few extra simple roles and items for doctor4t's "The Last Voyage of the Harpy Express"
body:
Adds a few extra roles and items to [doctor4t](https://www.youtube.com/doctor4t)'s [The Last Voyage of the Harpy Express]((https://modrinth.com/mod/harpy-express-mod))

### Roles:
- Doctor | Civilian role, spawns with antidote that cures poisoned players

- Attendant | Civilian role, spawns with master key that looks identical to a normal key and can open any room door but only has three uses

- Poisoner | Killer role focused around poisoning, has a custom shop with cheaper poison as well as custom toxin item that acts like a knife that poisons its targets. Will only spawn when there are 2 or more killers

- Bandit | Killer role that spawns with a Bandits Revolver and crowbar, has a custom shop with a slightly cheaper gun but more expensive knife. Stops vigilantes from being able to clear themselves at the beginning of games

### Items:
- Antidote: Cures poison with a 2 minute cooldown
  
- Toxin: Poisons a player killing them after 15 seconds
  
- Master Key: Can open any of the seven room doors, breaks after three uses (Currently uses a use when opening a glass door so make sure not to hold it out unless you're opening a room)

- Bandit Revolver: Looks the exact same as a revolver but instead of dropping after every kill it has a small chance to drop and a large chance to just be removed (stops the bandit from giving out a billion guns when they want to kill people)

### Extra Info:
- To disable or enable specific roles run "/setEnabledRole [role] [true/false]".
  
- To actually have the custom roles in your game you MUST use "/tmm:start harpymodloader:modded [round length]" to start the match, if you do not the custom roles will not be given out.

- Usually harpy mod loader will overwrite the default killer role with the modded ones but harpy simple roles adds a workaround for this, simply use the /setEnableRole command on the "killer" role to choose whether or not it is in the role pool.

### Credits:
- [doctor4t](https://www.youtube.com/doctor4t) for making the awesome mod in the first place
- [The Last Voyage of the Harpy Express](https://modrinth.com/mod/harpy-express-mod)
- [Harpy Mod Loader](https://modrinth.com/mod/harpymodloader) by [agmass](https://modrinth.com/user/agmas)
- Thanks to Popryn for making some of the item textures and for helping test the mod
